positive: Stylized cosmic astronaut floating in deep space, surrounded by bioluminescent nebula clouds and crystalline geometric formations. The astronaut's silhouette is crisp and striking against the vibrant, contrasting colors of the nebula (electric blue, magenta, turquoise). Minimalistic, highly detailed linework, clean vector art aesthetic, suitable for repeating print pattern. Cinematic lighting, high contrast, central composition, symmetrical balance, deep depth of field. Studio shot quality, crisp edges, vibrant colors.
negative: blurry, noise, grainy, low detail, poor anatomy, deformed, watermark, text, logo, signature, gradient fade, cluttered, realistic photo, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs
